preguntas.pregunta: [1/20] Ana is Argentinian but ___ husband is from Nigeria.
[2/20] Venice is famous for ___ beautiful canals.
[3/20] William can't play the piano, but he can play the guitar really ___ .
[4/20] She can't run very ___ because she hurt her leg.
[5/20] My dad loves sushi, but I don't like ___ . It's horrible!
[6/20] Sharon likes Omar, but he doesn't like ___ .
[7/20] ___ do tigers live? In Asia or Africa.
[8/20] ___ high is Mount Everest?
[9/20] My wife ___ in a bank and I work in a hospital.
[10/20] I'm from Spain ___ I live and work in London.
[11/20] They are arriving ___ Friday ___ 6:30 in the evening.
[12/20] Don't look for them now, they always go to bed early ___ night.
[13/20] He prefers football, so he ___ goes to the opera.
[14/20] One-word adverbs of frequency like 'often' or 'sometimes' go ___ .
opciones: at the end of the sentence

preguntas.pregunta: [15/20] In my new apartment, ___ two sofas and a television in the living room.
[16/20] The desk is next to the bed and ___ front of the window.
[17/20] Is there a cash machine near here? Yes, there is. It's ___ the supermarket.
[18/20] Is there a lift in the hotel? No, ___ . Sorry.
[19/20] Please ___ a friend to the party tonight!
[20/20] The traffic light is red. ___ !
